text.title: Company Prompt Library Pattern Decision Tree
text.summary: Two-question tree: preconditions present? library size? Routes to single-file spec, per-role-pack spec, or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: Are ALL preconditions satisfied? (≥3 LLM devs AND no working library AND single accountable owner nameable AND inventory.csv ready)

branch.question: After inventory dedup, is total prompt count < 20?

branch.conclusion: Emit a single-file library spec with `prompts/role/` + `prompts/task/` namespaces only. Skip multi-pack split; single owner.
Emit a per-role-pack namespace spec with explicit override_layers list. Each pack gets its own owner.
Skip this methodology. Surface the missing precondition (no owner? <3 devs? library already exists?). Defer until the gap is closed.

text.example: inputs: {devs=12, existing_library=false, owner=alex@acme.com, inventory_rows=84} q-preconditions -> true q-size -> false (84 >= 20) => conclusion r2-layered-override: emit per-role-pack spec.
